title: staffKM v3 — LLM 用量 (from usage_log)

options.content:
此 dashboard 需 PostgreSQL datasource 才能 query `usage_log` table。

當前 stack 只有 Prometheus；資料源請手動加 PG datasource，或直接在 staffKM `/admin/usage` 看圖。

Panel 設定預留 — datasource UID 改為實際 PG 後生效。

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens), 0) FROM usage_log WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) FROM usage_log WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT count(*) FROM usage_log WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT 100.0 * count(*) FILTER (WHERE status != 'ok') / NULLIF(count(*), 0) AS pct FROM usage_log WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, workspace_id::text AS metric, SUM(total_tokens) AS value FROM usage_log WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '14 days' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1
